endpoints.label: data.bilibili.com /log/web
endpoints.side_effect: Should not affect playback, history, or membership features.

endpoints.label: data.bilibili.com /v2/log
endpoints.rationale: Blocks the new web behavior tracking beacons.
endpoints.side_effect: Should not affect playback, history, or membership features.

endpoints.label: cm.bilibili.com
endpoints.side_effect: May leave some campaign or promo modules blank.

endpoints.label: api.bilibili.com /x/click-interface
endpoints.rationale: Optionally blocks watch-heartbeat and progress requests.
endpoints.side_effect: Affects cross-device resume, watch history, or playback progress; off by default.
